what_it_does: Records metadata for a design-source image asset named pitch-deck/p-07.jpg and labels it as design ground truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter describes an image/jpeg blob with zero width and height.
The file path and id both indicate it belongs to the pitch-deck/p-07 image in the design-source channel.
Body text declares it is 'SOURCE design ground-truth' for pitch-deck/p-07.jpg.
standouts: Image dimensions are recorded as 0x0 despite being an image/jpeg blob.
concerns: Width and height are 0, which may indicate missing or unextracted image dimensions.
The links array is empty, so relationships to other assets are not declared locally.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured asset metadata.
References a blob URI and an image://design-source address scheme.
Separates machine metadata from a human-readable source note.
notes: This is a ledger card for a pitch-deck image asset that marks it as design ground truth but omits size and links.
questions: Why are the image width and height set to 0?
What does the empty links array imply about intended relationships?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record a design-source image ground truth; the file does that, but dimension fields are not populated.
intention_signals: It tries to anchor a pitch-deck image as an authoritative design-source artifact within a channel-memory ledger.
contribution: Provides a stable, addressable metadata record that links a pitch-deck image to a blob and a design-source channel, preserving a ground-truth label for downstream reference.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory ledger entry for the pitch-deck/p-07.jpg design-source image asset, including blob reference, MIME type, creation metadata, and a 'SOURCE design ground-truth' label.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and mark a pitch-deck image as authoritative design-source ground truth within the company's channel-memory system.
